services.title: Electrical Works

services.title: Electrical Panel Works

services.title: HVAC Systems
services.description: Design, supply, installation and commissioning of HVAC systems for all facility types.

services.title: Fire Fighting Systems
services.description: End-to-end fire detection and suppression systems compliant with NBC norms.

services.title: AMC Services

services.title: Civil & Structural
services.description: Civil support works, structural fabrication and erection for industrial projects.

services.title: Plumbing & MEP
services.description: Mechanical, electrical and plumbing works for large-scale industrial facilities.

projects.title: LG Electronics Factory - Electrical & HVAC Installation
projects.description: Complete HT/LT electrical installation and HVAC system for LG's manufacturing facility including panel rooms, cable laying and chiller plant commissioning.

projects.title: Hilti India - AMC & Maintenance Contract
projects.description: Annual maintenance contract covering electrical systems, HVAC, fire fighting and plumbing for Hilti's regional facility.

projects.title: Schenck Rotec - Panel Installation
projects.description: Supply and installation of 20 dock panels and thermography-based panel maintenance for Schenck Rotec's industrial facility.

projects.title: Industrial Warehouse - Fire Fighting System
projects.description: Design and installation of complete fire hydrant and sprinkler network for a 1.2 lakh sq ft warehouse.

projects.title: Commercial Complex - Integrated MEP
projects.description: Integrated MEP works for a G+8 commercial complex including electrical, HVAC, plumbing and fire fighting.

projects.title: Hospital HVAC Upgrade
projects.description: HVAC system upgrade for OT, ICU and ward areas including precision AHUs and clean room compliance.

testimonials.quote: MST delivered our HVAC and electrical works on time and within budget. Their team showed great technical depth and professionalism throughout the project.
testimonials.name: Facility Manager

testimonials.quote: We have been working with Mithila Shail Tech on our AMC contract for over two years. Their response time and quality of maintenance is consistently excellent.
testimonials.name: Operations Head
